title: leucas hirta
intro: Leucas hirta, also known as wild sage or hairy leucas, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of Leucas hirta include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Leucas hirta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Leucas hirta can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine as a paste or powder.
